content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

April 3, 2006

Phil Baldwin
Ukiah City Council
627 Willow Avenue
Ukiah, CA 95482

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-06-048

Dear Mr. Baldwin:

This letter confirms the receipt of your March 28, 2006, request for advice regarding Mayor Mark Ashiku of Ukiah, and a potential conflict of interest. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations section 18329(b)(8)(B), unless the mayor has authorized you as his representative, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. I have enclosed a copy of regulation 18329 for your review.

If you believe a violation of the Political Reform Act has occurred, you may file the enclosed complaint form with our Enforcement Division.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division
